name: Ace of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Ace of Pentacles is a tangible new opportunity — a seed of prosperity offered from a steady hand. It favors practical beginnings: the job, the investment, the first brick of something lasting.
meaning_reversed: The seed slips away or lands on poor soil: an opportunity missed, delayed, or built on shaky ground. Reassess the fundamentals before planting again.
love: It signals a relationship with real-world staying power — grounded, stable, and worth investing in.
career: It marks a concrete opportunity — new job, raise, or venture — with solid long-term potential.
mood: Hopeful and grounded — opportunity that feels solid in the hand.
spiritual: The Ace of Pentacles is the seed of abundance: matter as a place where spirit takes root.

name: Two of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Two of Pentacles juggles competing demands with a dancer's rhythm — work and home, income and expense, this and that. It suggests balance is possible, but as ongoing motion rather than a fixed state.
meaning_reversed: The juggle fails: too many commitments, dropped responsibilities, or finances wobbling. Something must be set down deliberately before it falls.
love: It points to balancing the relationship against life's other demands — presence needs scheduling too.
career: It signals multitasking and shifting priorities; adaptability works until it becomes overload.
mood: Busy and adaptable — juggling kept just barely graceful.
spiritual: It is balance as practice: finding rhythm within motion instead of waiting for stillness.

name: Three of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Three of Pentacles is mastery meeting collaboration: skilled work recognized and improved by working with others. It marks the stage where talent, planning, and teamwork build something none could alone.
meaning_reversed: The collaboration frays — credit disputed, standards slipping, or everyone building a different cathedral. Realign on the shared blueprint.
love: It frames the relationship as a joint project — effort, communication, and shared building.
career: It signals successful teamwork and skill being noticed by people who matter.
mood: Cooperative and engaged — skill meeting appreciation.
spiritual: It is craft as devotion: building carefully with others as a quiet form of worship.

name: Four of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Four of Pentacles clutches what it has: security achieved, then gripped so tightly nothing new can be received. It affirms prudence while asking what the holding is costing.
meaning_reversed: The grip opens — generosity, wise spending, or releasing control that was strangling growth. It can also warn of the opposite excess: letting security scatter carelessly.
love: It warns of possessiveness or emotional withholding — safety that comes from control isn't intimacy.
career: It signals financial caution and consolidation, with a caution against hoarding resources or authority.
mood: Cautious and guarded — holding on a little too tightly.
spiritual: It is loosening attachment: learning that security gripped becomes a cage, and released becomes trust.

name: Five of Pentacles
keywords_upright: feeling left out in the cold
meaning_upright: The Five of Pentacles is the cold outside the lit window: material hardship, exclusion, or the feeling that help is for other people. The church door is unlocked — support exists, but pride or despair keeps one walking past it.
meaning_reversed: The hard season turns: help is accepted, finances stabilize, and the sense of exile eases. Recovery accelerates once asking for support stops feeling like failure.
love: It reflects feeling shut out or weathering hardship as a couple — let the other person in from the cold.
career: It signals financial strain or job insecurity; seek the available support rather than enduring alone.
mood: Discouraged and cold — outside the lit window, for now.
spiritual: It is faith through hardship: remembering the door is unlocked and letting help in is not failure.

name: Six of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Six of Pentacles is the flow of generosity in balance: giving from abundance, receiving with grace, and the scales held fair. It signals help arriving — or the means and call to provide it.
meaning_reversed: The gift has hooks: charity with strings, loans that become leverage, or giving that quietly buys control. Check which side of the scale you're on and what the exchange really costs.
love: It asks whether giving and receiving are balanced — care should circulate, not flow one way.
career: It points to mentorship, raises, or support networks — generosity now returns multiplied.
mood: Generous and balanced — giving and receiving in easy rhythm.
spiritual: It is the sacred flow: abundance circulating, blessing the giver and receiver alike.

name: Seven of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Seven of Pentacles leans on the hoe and evaluates the vines: effort invested, growth visible, harvest not yet in. It counsels patience and honest assessment — is this crop worth the continued tending?
meaning_reversed: It questions the investment: effort poured into thin soil, impatience uprooting what needed time, or persistence in a field that will never yield. Redirect the labor where growth is real.
love: It marks a pause to assess the relationship's growth — investment is judged by trajectory, not just time served.
career: It signals long-term projects maturing slowly; evaluate returns honestly before investing further.
mood: Patient and evaluative — leaning on the hoe, taking stock.
spiritual: It is trust in slow growth: honoring seasons that ripen quietly beneath the surface.

name: Eight of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Eight of Pentacles is the apprentice at the bench, carving pentacle after pentacle a little better each time. It honors focused practice and the unglamorous repetition that becomes mastery.
meaning_reversed: The work sours: perfectionism that never ships, corners cut from boredom, or diligence spent on skills that lead nowhere wanted. Reconnect the daily grind to its purpose.
love: It frames connection as craft — small consistent efforts, done attentively, build the bond.
career: It is the card of skill development and dedicated work — the mastery being built now compounds.
mood: Diligent and absorbed — good work, done with care.
spiritual: It is work as meditation: mastery built one mindful repetition at a time.

name: Nine of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Nine of Pentacles stands in a garden of her own making: independence, refinement, and abundance earned by discipline. It invites enjoying the fruits without apology — this was built, not given.
meaning_reversed: The garden loses its pleasure: success that feels hollow, dependence dressed as luxury, or working so hard for the vineyard there's no time to taste the grapes.
love: It values wholeness over neediness — a partnership of two complete people, or contentment in one's own company.
career: It signals financial independence and well-earned rewards; your work stands on its own merit.
mood: Self-assured and serene — enjoying a garden of one's own making.
spiritual: It is gratitude for earned abundance: independence held lightly, savored fully.

name: Ten of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Ten of Pentacles is wealth that outlives its maker: family security, legacy, and structures built to last generations. It marks long-term stability and the deep comfort of belonging to something enduring.
meaning_reversed: The estate shakes: family friction over money, foundations less solid than they look, or riches that never became a home. Rebuild for permanence, not appearance.
love: It points to commitment with deep roots — family, shared assets, a future measured in decades.
career: It signals lasting success, established institutions, and decisions best made on a generational timescale.
mood: Secure and proud — roots deep, table full.
spiritual: It is legacy: blessings tended so well they outlive the hands that planted them.

name: Page of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Page of Pentacles studies the coin like a scholar with a fascinating text: eager to learn, practical, and quietly ambitious. It favors starting the course, the apprenticeship, the savings plan — small diligent beginnings.
meaning_reversed: The studying stalls: plans admired but not started, focus that evaporates, lessons available but unlearned. Ground the dream with one concrete first step.
love: It brings sincere, steady interest that builds slowly and values reliability over fireworks.
career: It signals learning opportunities, new practical ventures, and ambitions pursued step by step.
mood: Studious and motivated — a plan taking earnest shape.
spiritual: It is grounded manifestation: treating study and small steps as the honest magic they are.

name: Knight of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Knight of Pentacles is the slowest knight and the only one who always arrives: methodical, reliable, and immune to shortcuts. He counsels steady routine and patient effort toward a distant but certain goal.
meaning_reversed: Steadiness becomes stagnation: routine hardened into rut, diligence into drudgery, patience into refusal to adapt. The path needs freshening, not abandoning.
love: He is the dependable partner who shows up every time — devotion expressed through consistency rather than drama.
career: He signals slow, thorough progress and trustworthy execution; the tortoise wins this one.
spiritual: It is devotion through consistency: showing up daily as its own quiet vow.

name: Queen of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The Queen of Pentacles keeps a warm, well-run world: nurturing expressed through practical care — the meal cooked, the budget balanced, the garden thriving. She embodies grounded generosity that makes others feel secure.
meaning_reversed: The provider runs dry: caring for everyone but herself, juggling work and home past sustainability, or measuring love in provisions. Her garden needs tending too.
love: She offers steady, tangible devotion — a home built together, care shown in daily acts.
career: She signals resourceful management and creating environments where people and projects flourish.
mood: Nurturing and practical — warmth expressed in tangible care.
spiritual: She is the sacred ordinary: body, home, and hearth tended as holy ground.

name: King of Pentacles
meaning_upright: The King of Pentacles rules a prosperous, well-tended realm: business mastery, patient wealth-building, and generosity from genuine abundance. He advises steady stewardship — grow what lasts and share the surplus.
meaning_reversed: The golden touch corrupts: wealth as scoreboard, control of resources as power over people, comfort defended at any cost. Riches serve life, not the reverse.
love: He is the committed provider whose loyalty is bedrock — warmth must flow alongside the security he builds.
career: He marks the summit of material success — sound investments, business leadership, and enduring prosperity.
mood: Assured and generous — abundance worn comfortably.
spiritual: He is stewardship: wealth as responsibility, prosperity shared as gratitude made visible.
